translations.it: È fatto apposta per i bambini.
translations.yue: 嗰個係專畀小朋友用嘅。
translations.vi: Cái đó dành riêng cho trẻ em.
translations.hi: यह खास तौर पर बच्चों के लिए है.
translations.ja: それは子ども向けのものです。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun in nominative singular (neuter); subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present indicative, linking subject to a predicative complement.
Predicative adjective functioning as the complement of the copula; selects the following für-PP specifying the target group.
Preposition governing accusative; marks beneficiary/target.
Common noun in accusative plural as the object of the preposition 'für' (target group).

sentences.target: Ich suche etwas speziell für Allergiker.

translations.de: Ich suche etwas speziell für Allergiker.
translations.en: I'm looking for something specifically for people with allergies.
translations.es: Busco algo especialmente para personas con alergias.
translations.fr: Je cherche quelque chose spécialement pour les personnes allergiques.
translations.it: Cerco qualcosa apposta per chi ha allergie.
translations.ko: 특별히 알레르기가 있는 사람들을 위한 걸 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找专门给过敏人群用的东西。
translations.yue: 我想搵專畀過敏人士用嘅嘢。
translations.ru: Я ищу что-то специально для людей с аллергией.
translations.pt: Estou procurando algo especialmente para pessoas com alergia.
translations.he: אני מחפש משהו שמיועד במיוחד לאנשים עם אלרגיות.
translations.tr: Alerjisi olan kişiler için özel olarak bir şey arıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm thứ dành riêng cho người bị dị ứng.
translations.ar: أبحث عن شيء مخصص خصيصًا لمن يعانون من الحساسية.
translations.nl: Ik zoek iets speciaal voor mensen met allergieën.
translations.uk: Я шукаю щось спеціально для людей з алергією.
translations.hu: Olyasmit keresek, ami kifejezetten allergiásoknak való.
translations.hi: मैं ऐसी चीज़ ढूंढ रहा हूँ जो खास तौर पर एलर्जी वाले लोगों के लिए हो.
translations.el: Ψάχνω κάτι ειδικά για άτομα με αλλεργίες.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter noe som er spesielt for folk med allergi.
translations.id: Saya mencari sesuatu yang khusus untuk orang yang alergi.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter något särskilt för personer med allergi.
translations.ro: Caut ceva special pentru persoanele alergice.
translations.cs: Hledám něco speciálně pro lidi s alergií.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter noget specielt til folk med allergi.
translations.ja: アレルギーのある人向けのものを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; selects a direct object.
Indefinite pronoun functioning as the direct object (accusative) of 'suche'.
Adverb modifying the following für-PP/the search specification, meaning 'in a specific way/for a specific group'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the beneficiary/target group.
Common noun (form identical in sg/pl); here used generically/plurally as object of 'für'.

sentences.target: Er hat speziell diesen Film empfohlen.

translations.de: Er hat speziell diesen Film empfohlen.
translations.fr: Il a recommandé tout spécialement ce film.
translations.zh-Hans: 他特意推荐了这部电影。
translations.pt: Ele recomendou este filme em especial.
translations.he: הוא המליץ במיוחד על הסרט הזה.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đặc biệt đề xuất phim này.
translations.nl: Hij heeft juist deze film aangeraden.
translations.uk: Він спеціально порекомендував саме цей фільм.
translations.hi: उसने खास तौर पर इसी फिल्म की सिफारिश की.
translations.id: Dia secara khusus merekomendasikan film ini.
translations.sv: Han rekommenderade särskilt den här filmen.
translations.ro: El a recomandat în mod special acest film.
translations.ja: 彼はこの映画を特に勧めました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Auxiliary 'haben', 3rd person singular present indicative, forming the present perfect with the participle.
Sentence/VP adverb modifying the verb phrase; focuses the selection ('in particular/especially').
Demonstrative determiner, accusative masculine singular, modifying 'Film'.
Common noun, accusative masculine singular; direct object of 'empfohlen'.
Past participle (Partizip II) of the lexical verb 'empfehlen'; main predicate in perfect with 'hat'.

sentences.target: Die Schuhe sind speziell für breite Füße.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈʃuːə zɪnt ʃpeˈtsi̯ɛl fyːɐ ˈbʁaɪ̯tə ˈfyːzə/

translations.de: Die Schuhe sind speziell für breite Füße.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈʃuːə zɪnt ʃpeˈtsi̯ɛl fyːɐ ˈbʁaɪ̯tə ˈfyːzə/
translations.en: These shoes are specifically for wide feet.
translations.es: Estos zapatos son especialmente para pies anchos.
translations.fr: Ces chaussures sont spécialement pour les pieds larges.
translations.it: Queste scarpe sono fatte apposta per piedi larghi.
translations.ko: 이 신발은 발이 넓은 사람들을 위해 특별히 만든 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这双鞋是专门为宽脚设计的。
translations.yue: 呢對鞋係專為闊腳設計嘅。
translations.ru: Эта обувь специально для широких стоп.
translations.pt: Estes sapatos são especialmente para pés largos.
translations.he: הנעליים האלה מיועדות במיוחד לרגליים רחבות.
translations.tr: Bu ayakkabılar özellikle geniş ayaklar için.
translations.vi: Đôi giày này dành riêng cho bàn chân rộng.
translations.ar: هذه الأحذية مخصصة خصيصًا للأقدام العريضة.
translations.nl: Deze schoenen zijn speciaal voor brede voeten.
translations.uk: Це взуття спеціально для широких стоп.
translations.hu: Ezek a cipők kifejezetten széles lábra valók.
translations.hi: ये जूते खास तौर पर चौड़े पैरों के लिए हैं.
translations.pl: Te buty są specjalnie dla szerokich stóp.
translations.el: Αυτά τα παπούτσια είναι ειδικά για φαρδιά πόδια.
translations.nb: Disse skoene er spesielt for brede føtter.
translations.id: Sepatu ini khusus untuk kaki yang lebar.
translations.sv: De här skorna är särskilt för breda fötter.
translations.ro: Pantofii aceștia sunt special pentru picioare late.
translations.cs: Tyto boty jsou speciálně pro široká chodidla.
translations.da: Disse sko er specielt til brede fødder.
translations.fi: Nämä kengät ovat erityisesti leveille jaloille.
translations.ja: この靴は幅広の足向けです。

Common noun, nominative plural; subject of the copular clause.

Preposition governing accusative; marks intended target/beneficiary.
Attributive adjective, accusative plural (agreeing with 'Füße'); positive degree.
